title: 9 Herbal Tinctures For Dry Mouth
description: Aloe vera tinctures contains aloin, acemannan, and other active constituents that have anti-inflammatory and moisturizing properties. These properties help to soothe and calm the mucous membranes in the mouth, reducing dryness and discomfort. The aloin in aloe vera tinctures also has antibacterial properties, which can help to prevent infections that can cause dry mouth.
